## Hypothesis

The overnight_grinder has identified 5 keepers with a top edge_capture of $670.6 and a wide_pnl of $6,688.35. These keepers may capture a genuine edge in the market, but further analysis is needed to determine their validity and potential for real-world trading.

## Mechanism

The keepers were identified through a parameter sweep of the overnight_grinder, which searched for combinations of parameters that resulted in high edge_capture and wide_pnl values. The top keeper had a wide_pnl of $6,688.35 and an edge_capture of $670.6, with a win rate of 0.393.
